description: Widescreen promo poster built on a photograph of President Trump standing on a stage in an industrial machine shop or factory setting, wearing a dark blue suit, white shirt, and a purple-blue tie, pointing off to his left with his right arm. Behind him are an American flag and a gold-fringed presidential flag, with metalworking machinery and equipment on the shop floor, and a long blue banner reading 'JOBS! JOBS! JOBS!' on the back wall. Across the top in white serif capitals is the headline 'JOIN AMERICA'S WORKFORCE REVIVAL'. In the lower right corner is a small embossed Department of Labor seal and the URL 'APPRENTICESHIP.GOV'.
notable_text: JOIN AMERICA'S WORKFORCE REVIVAL; JOBS! JOBS! JOBS!; APPRENTICESHIP.GOV
